codeReview.summary: The fix commit addresses the two prior blocking gaps: protected command dispatch is re-gated after logout via auth lifecycle guards, and status now validates token liveness and returns actionable re-auth guidance for expired/revoked sessions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker hit and documented an important CLI-test pitfall (sync child-process calls deadlock in-process mock-server tests), but this nuance is not currently captured in the skill procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges in /Users/justen/.factory/missions/54bd84c5-2680-4f00-890c-9c832860b3d4/handoffs/2026-02-28T12-11-42-441Z__relay-foundation-fix-cli-auth-regating-and-token-liveness__23898abf-e853-4d6a-a0be-8999d5600754.json; test/auth/cli-auth-gating.test.ts:106-109 documents the spawnSync/execSync event-loop blocking behavior; .factory/skills/mors-global-worker/SKILL.md does not mention this testing constraint.
